-Hello! Here's the full Awakener voice lines source sheet.
-The English translations up there have been human translated (we just completed the last batch of Awakener voice lines translation).
-The Japanese translations are done by our Japanese version publisher, Altplus. Characters that are not released in the JP version don't have JP voice line translations... yet.

-To contribute voice line translations for other languages, please download the source sheet and edit locally, then upload it via GitHub!
